The Neoplatonist structure of Plotinus goes: The One, who sends his first emanatino Nous (Intellect) to construct the universe. We can rise up into the eternal world or reality, of forms, to ap..." evidence.text:
101
The Neoplatonist structure of Plotinus goes: The One, who sends his first emanatino Nous (Intellect) to construct the universe. We can rise up into the eternal world or reality, of forms, to apprehend Nous. The forms are alive; collectively, they comprise Nous. Below them is Soul.

We could perhaps equate the One with God; Nous with Christ as Pantocrator, but Soul would have to go. In any case, to so equate God with the One, Christ with Nous, would be to abolish their equality in the Trinity

(four) The specific reference to "Saint Sophia."

(five) In the book "The Wisdom of Solomon" I have discovered an exact account and description of the very inner nature of this entity which entered me or somehow revealed Itself to me both outside and in¬ side. It was indeed Haggia Sophia.

I've seen her, heard her, in many guises, and finally the name "St. Sophia." Gnostic revelation has broken through into my head in the modern world. I think anyone versed in Gnosticism who read my notes would say, "You're a Gnostic." I am not happy about this, but it is so, based on 3-74. Simon Magus lives. Also, it is a thoroughly Greek syncretistic system. I must go where truth (as I've experienced it) takes me; my experience is

234
I've seen her, heard her, in many guises, and finally the name "St. Sophia." Gnostic revelation has broken through into my head in the modern world. I think anyone versed in Gnosticism who read my notes would say, "You're a Gnostic." I am not happy about this, but it is so, based on 3-74. Simon Magus lives. Also, it is a thoroughly Greek syncretistic system. I must go where truth (as I've experienced it) takes me; my experience is of St. Sophia. Well, this is a modified Gnostici

If I view her as the ultimate good agency of our universe, then surely I have been grated the greatest vision possible. I will always wonder why. Anyhow I cherish it. Wow. To see her defeat the baleful force over & over again, and always smiling, always wiser than that huge blind drive of efficient cause (ananke). The Bible is right (about her, the logos) but also Plato is right in Timaeus. What I saw was the, not just a. We are within a construct which she is building; it is a kind of body.

(4)

The Pantocrator judges the world. But first, before the dies irae occurs, Elijah is sent here to change the world, to make it acceptable before the judgment comes. Thus Elijah not only comes (first) but also changes the world into something that will be judged favorably - so that not a curse - God's curse - but God's approbation, will later occur. This does not mean that at the "Elijah stage" the world will be made perfect (i.e. the kingdom established); he will merely make i

folder 32 - 007
In a sense, positive action of any kind is an involvement in the world. It takes the world as real. Balking, oddly, carries perhaps a greater weight, since the step prior to affirming God seems to be the denial of the world. (Or: the road to affirming the true God stems from the initial denying of the world.) The Ramparts thing -- that was a direct disavowal of the power of the warden-archons, perhaps. I

So thomas entered me via Christ, which must mean that he (well, him for sure) he + I are part of the Cosmic Corpus Christi. otherwise, he could not have acted on me as one form of theolepsy. In Christ, we are literally as + so are souls (selves) in the future, as well in the past So my anamnesis was not a memory of Christ in a sense, but participation in Christ who is eternal + hence possesses those "back all the way to the pleroma" memories. + especiallyp most fundamentally
